title: Wire a contact form with to_form, validate, and error handling
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/raw_form_contact.ex has a contact form that never displays errors correctly and uses Map.put on the changeset. Write lib/my_app_web/live/contact_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ContactLive) that: (1) builds @form via to_form(Support.change_contact(%ContactRequest{})) in mount, (2) handle_event("validate", params, socket) runs the changeset through Map.put(:action, :validate) then to_form, (3) handle_event("save", ...) handles {:ok, _} and {:error, changeset} branches, (4) uses <.form>/<.input>/<.input type="textarea"> instead of text_input/textarea helpers.
tier_rationale: Multi-step: build to_form + action :validate + proper save branches + swap helpers for core_components. Sonnet usually gets 3 of 4.
research_citation: John Elm Labs top-3 form mistakes #3
